title: Company Names Tribunal decision: UK Association For Gifted and Talented Children
body: "Application number 5077  Applicant National Association for Gifted Children objected to the name used by UK Association For Gifted and Talented Children under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 20 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of UK Association For Gifted and Talented Children is changed to 15217355, LTD.  "
